title: selaginella alstonii
intro: Selaginella alstonii, also known as the resurrection fern, is a species of resurrection fern in the genus Selaginella, a type of evergreen, lepidodendroid vascular plant that is highly adaptable to dry environments. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella alstonii include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, it is often used in tea or supplement form to promote overall well-being and provide relief from various health conditions.
